stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true with regards to external respiration?

options.a: The exchange of the gases CO and CO<sub>2</sub> takes place in all bodily tissues.
options.b: The exchange of the gases O<sub>2</sub> and CO<sub>2</sub> takes place in the bronchioles.
options.c: The exchange of the gases O<sub>2</sub> and CO takes place only within the capillaries of the lung.
options.d: The exchange of the gases O<sub>2</sub> and CO<sub>2</sub> takes place in the alveoli.
